description: Due to a sudden supply chain shortage, the Plant Director has ordered an administrative furlough for the Production staff. Using the directive document at ~/Desktop/furlough_directive.txt, create a new employment status in Sentrifugo named 'Furloughed - Unpaid' and update the status for the four employees listed in the directive. Additionally, deactivate the 'Annual Leave' policy in the Leave Types configuration and post a company-wide announcement titled 'Plant Operations Pause' explaining the situation.
